text: Being here elicits a sense of curiosity and anticipation within me. I stand at the threshold of a carefully designed space—modern, sleek, and filled with the hum of innovation. As I move closer to the vibrant display focused on 'R+D', I feel energized by the potential for discovery. I am aware of my own smallness within this expanse of human ingenuity, and I feel drawn to engage, to learn, and to reflect on the ever-evolving relationship between humans and technology.
